top_signals.title: Backpack launches securities platform blending traditional and tokenized stock trading
top_signals.summary: Backpack Securities combines a U.S.-regulated brokerage for traditional equities ownership with a tokenization platform.

top_signals.title: True Launches the True AI Capability Index℠ to Redefine Executive Assessment
top_signals.summary: True, the premier global executive talent platform powered by data, AI, and deep sector expertise, announced today the launch of the True AI Capability Index℠, a proprietary framework that predicts executive performance in the AI-transformation age. While the broader market struggles to assess technical adaptability, True is providing the first reliable system to assess candidates [...]

top_signals.title: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized HLSCOPE fund launches on Tron, marking first Securitize product issued on the once-maligned blockchain
top_signals.summary: Hamilton Lane’s tokenized Senior Credit Opportunities Fund will be the first Securitize-issued asset to launch on TRON.

top_signals.title: Berkshire Hathaway Specialty Insurance Expands Marine Leadership; Names Ben Wyatt as Head of Marine for North America and the UK
top_signals.summary: Berkshire Hathaway Specialty Insurance (BHSI) today announced that Ben Wyatt has been promoted to Head of Marine for North America and the UK. Effective immediately, Ben expands his leadership responsibilities beyond the U.S. to include oversight of BHSI’s Marine business in the UK and Canada. In this role, Ben will drive underwriting, strategy, and portfolio [...]

top_signals.title: Following token-dumping scandal, Movement seeks new life as a Layer 1
top_signals.summary: Move Industries has partnered with several firms, including Circle, as it relaunches Movement as a Layer 1 and refocuses on emerging markets.
